hooks.command: cd /home/ubuntu/projects/vivantel/virage && npm run fix && git add -u && npm run lint && npm run type-check:ci
hooks.statusMessage: Running lint:fix + format + lint + type-check before commit...

hooks.command: echo 'SKILL STANDARD: Load .agents/skills/skill-guru/SKILL.md before modifying skill files to ensure Agent Skills v1.0 compliance.'
echo 'SKILL STANDARD: Load .agents/skills/skill-guru/SKILL.md before creating skill files to ensure Agent Skills v1.0 compliance.'
echo 'PLANNER SKILL: Load .agents/skills/planner/SKILL.md before writing this plan file to follow the planning workflow.'
echo 'PLANNER SKILL: Load .agents/skills/planner/SKILL.md before editing this plan file to follow the planning workflow.'
echo 'DOCS: If this edit adds/removes/renames a user-visible feature (strategy, CLI flag, package, config field), load .agents/skills/readme/SKILL.md and update README.md.'
